---
title: "Contributors"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: about.css
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="about-hero" style="padding-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <p class="about-eyebrow">CONTRIBUTORS</p>
  <h1 class="about-title">Built by a<br/>global community.</h1>
  <p class="about-tagline">Every chapter, diagram, lab, and code review reflects the expertise of contributors from around the world.</p>
</div>
```

## By the Numbers {#stats}

```{=html}
<div class="about-section">
<div class="stats-strip">
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number" id="contrib-total">92</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Contributors</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number" id="contrib-forks">2,725</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Forks</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number" id="contrib-stars">22,800+</span>
    <span class="stat-label">GitHub Stars</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number">6</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Continents</span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(async () => {
  try {
    const r = await fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/harvard-edge/cs249r_book');
    if (!r.ok) return;
    const d = await r.json();
    const fmt = n => n >= 1000 ? (n/1000).toFixed(1).replace(/\.0$/,'') + 'k+' : n + '+';
    document.getElementById('contrib-stars').textContent = fmt(d.stargazers_count);
    document.getElementById('contrib-forks').textContent = d.forks_count.toLocaleString();
  } catch(e) {}
})();
</script>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<hr class="about-divider" />
```

## All Contributors {#all}

```{=html}
<div class="about-section">
<p>Click any avatar to visit their GitHub profile.</p>

<div class="contributors-mosaic" id="contributors-mosaic">
  <noscript>
    <p>View all contributors on <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book#contributors-">GitHub</a>.</p>
  </noscript>
</div>

<script>
async function loadContributorMosaic() {
  const container = document.getElementById('contributors-mosaic');
  try {
    let data;
    try {
      const localResp = await fetch('contributors.json');
      if (localResp.ok) {
        data = await localResp.json();
      }
    } catch(e) {}

    if (!data) {
      const resp = await fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/contributors?per_page=100');
      if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('API failed');
      data = await resp.json();
    }

    const contributors = (data.contributors || data)
      .filter(c => !c.login.includes('[bot]') && c.login !== 'dependabot' && c.login !== 'cursoragent');

    if (data.stats) {
      document.getElementById('contrib-total').textContent = contributors.length;
    }

    container.innerHTML = contributors.map(c => `
      <a href="${c.html_url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
         class="contributor-circle" title="${c.name || c.login}">
        <img src="${c.avatar_url}&s=96" alt="${c.login}" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" />
      </a>
    `).join('');
  } catch(e) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: var(--ab-text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem;">View contributors on <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book#contributors-">GitHub</a>.</p>';
  }
}
loadContributorMosaic();
</script>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<hr class="about-divider" />
```

## How to Contribute {#how}

```{=html}
<div class="about-section">
```

This curriculum is open source and welcomes contributions of all kinds. Whether you spot a typo, want to improve an explanation, add a figure, or write a new section — your contribution matters.

```{=html}
<div class="pillar-grid" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <div class="pillar-card">
    <div class="pillar-icon"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i></div>
    <h3>Content</h3>
    <p>Fix errors, improve explanations, add examples, or write new sections. Every improvement helps students learn.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="pillar-card">
    <div class="pillar-icon"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i></div>
    <h3>Code & Tooling</h3>
    <p>Improve build scripts, add interactive widgets, enhance the website, or contribute to TinyTorch modules.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="pillar-card">
    <div class="pillar-icon"><i class="bi bi-translate"></i></div>
    <h3>Translation</h3>
    <p>Help make the curriculum accessible to non-English speakers. Translation efforts are coordinated through GitHub.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="pillar-card">
    <div class="pillar-icon"><i class="bi bi-bug"></i></div>
    <h3>Bug Reports</h3>
    <p>Found something wrong? Open an issue on GitHub. Clear bug reports are one of the most valuable contributions.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="cta-btn-primary" style="font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 0.65rem 1.75rem;">
    <i class="bi bi-github" style="margin-right: 0.4rem;"></i> Contribute on GitHub
  </a>
</p>
</div>
```

:::
